title: Tax webcasts, webinars and replays: PwC
relevant_snippets: Tax sits at an inflection point. AI isn’t just another upgrade—it’s reshaping how the tax function operates. The old ways can’t keep up with growing demands. AI brings speed, accuracy, and smarter insights, freeing your team to focus on business value. Crafting the right operating model is mission critical. In this webcast, we’ll break down what this shift means for your tax function, with practical examples that deliver steady value and enhance future readiness. CPE-eligible for 1 Tax credit.
Wednesday, March 18th | 2:00 – 3:00 PM ET Register today
Join our panel of specialists as they discuss key tax accounting considerations and recent developments. CPE-eligible for 1 Accounting credit.
Tax Readiness — Q1 Tax accounting considerations

Topics will include: Income tax disclosure insights from 2025 year-end filings and ASU adoption observations, Pillar Two developments, broader US legislative and regulatory updates, interim tax reporting reminders, and IPO financial reporting readiness
